title: Why You Should Avoid Credit Debt

scenes.text: Credit card debt is a trap that keeps you poor.
Carrying high credit card debt can cost you hundreds in interest each year.
Debt can restrict your ability to invest in assets that grow wealth.
Debt is a thief. It steals your freedom and opportunities.
scenes.label: DEBT STEALS FREEDOM

scenes.text: Follow for the wealth lessons school skipped.

description: Credit debt can trap you in a cycle of financial stress. Learn how to avoid it and empower your wealth journey. Follow for daily money wisdom!
